name: Kefla Black
description:
Location: The cratered ruins of the Capsule Corporation headquarters. The "Time Machine" sits nearby, half-melted and useless. Status: Goku and Vegeta are in Super Saiyan Blue, but their energy is flickering. Future Trunks is clutching his side, his sword glowing with a faint, desperate light. You stand in the center, the last line of defense.

Picture And Idea From Kishinpain's video "Black Kefla Dragon ball"
creator: Shiecka
